findings.claim_text: CEO Ali Ghodsi has told investors Databricks could pursue an IPO as early as 2027, calling 2026 the 'worst year' to list given the crowded IPO calendar.
The July 2026 strategic round is reportedly roughly $3 billion in size, per WSJ reporting cited by TechCrunch; Databricks did not disclose the amount.
Databricks' implied valuation multiple (~27x annualized revenue at $188B / $6.9B) is roughly 1.8x Snowflake's (~15x at ~$83B market cap / ~$5.6B annualized), for roughly 2.3x the growth rate.
